title: The Great Adventures of Wild Bill Hickok
writer: John Peere Miles, George Rosener, George Arthur Durlam
actors: Bill Elliott, Monte Blue, Carole Wayne
plot: A short plot summary finds Wild Bill Hickok (Bill Elliott), the U.S. Marshal in Abilene, Kansas, opposing the Phantom Raiders, a gang of renegades raiding the cattle drives over the Chisholm Trail from Texas to Abilene. Hickok org...
